description.zh: 唐末藩镇割据演变而来的乱世。中原五朝更迭（后梁、后唐、后晋、后汉、后周），南方十国并立。名义上有朝廷，实际各节度使拥兵自重、各自为政。武将称帝、政权频繁更替，是中国历史上最混乱的时期之一。
description.en: An era of fragmentation following the Tang collapse. Five successive dynasties ruled the Central Plains while ten kingdoms coexisted in the south. Nominally unified under a court, regional warlords (jiedushi) held real power. Military strongmen seized thrones frequently, making this one of China's most chaotic periods.
